zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hitchcock於1556年出生在英國維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯時，他的父親Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes46歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Marr42歲。他於1580年5月7日與Maud Webb在英國英格蘭維爾爾特洛布利其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1586年12月1日在他的家鄉享年30歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hitchcock于1556年出生在英国維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯时，他的父亲Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes46岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Marr42岁。他于1580年5月7日与Maud Webb在英国英格兰維爾爾特洛布利其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1586年12月1日在他的家乡享年30岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hitchcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Hitch , a pet form of Richard , with the Middle English diminutive suffix -cok. Compare Heacock .

variants.name: Hitch
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hich, a rhyming pet form of Richard. Compare Hick .

variants.name: Hedgecoth
meanings: English: variant of   Hitchcock  . Compare   Hedgecock  .

variants.name: Hedgecock
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of   Hitchcock  , altered by folk etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hitchcock was born in 1556, in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes, was 46 and his mother, Isabel Elizabeth Marr, was 42. He married Maud Webb on 7 May 1580, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 December 1586, in his hometown, at the age of 30, and was buried in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hitchcock est né en 1556, à All Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Marr, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Maud Webb le 7 mai 1580, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1586, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à All Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hitchcock 1556 in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes 46 und seine Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Marr 42. Er hat am 7. Mai 1580 in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Maud Webb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. Dezember 1586 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hitchcock è nato il nel 1556 nel All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Elizabeth Marr, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Maud Webb il 7 maggio 1580, nel Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 dicembre 1586, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a All Cannings, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hitchcockが1556年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアル カニングズで生まれた時，父Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockesは46歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Marrは42歳であった。1580年5月7日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアトロウブリッジでMaud Webbと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1586年12月1日に故郷で30歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアアル カニングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hitchcock(이)가 1556년 영국 윌츠히르 앨 캔잉스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Marr(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1580년 5월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 Maud Webb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1586년 12월 1일 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 앨 캔잉스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hitchcock nasceu em 1556, em All Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Marr, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Webb em 7 de maio de 1580, em Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1586, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em All Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hitchcock родился в 1556 г. в местности алл каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henri Hiscoxe  Hiscockes было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Marr, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Webb 7 мая 1580 г. в местности троубридж, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 декабря 1586 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности алл каннингс, уилцхир, Англия.

Se casó con Maud Webb el 7 de mayo de 1580, en Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1586, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en All Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
